The NEET MDS 2026 application process has commenced for Awadh Dental College and Hospital admission to the MDS course, with Mar 30, 2026, being the last date to register. Also, the NEET MDS exam 2026 is going to be held on May 2, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: Is Awadh Dental College and Hospital a known college/Institute?
faqs.answer: Awadh Dental College and Hospital is a well-known institution for BDS, MDS courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Awadh Dental College and Hospital has a rating of 4.2 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4.5 on campuslife, 4 on placements, 4 on faculty and 4.5 on Infrastructure.

faqs.question: Which major specializations are available at Awadh Dental College and Hospital?
faqs.answer: Awadh Dental College and Hospital offers Degree courses including 1 UG and 7 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Awadh Dental College and Hospital has specializations such as MDS specializations in Oral Pathology , Oral and Maxillofacial Surgery, Orthodontics , Periodontology, Prosthodontics.

faqs.question: How is the faculty at Awadh Dental College and Hospital?
faqs.answer: Awadh Dental College and Hospital has been rated 4 for faculty as per reviews by students. This shows that Institute has qualified and experienced faculty members.

faqs.question: What facilities are there at Awadh Dental College and Hospital in terms of infrastructure?
faqs.answer: Awadh Dental College and Hospital has been rated 4.5 on Infrastructure parameter. Awadh Dental College and Hospital provide good facilities all around the campus such as Auditorium, Boys Hostel, Cafeteria, Girls Hostel, Gym, Hospital / Medical Facilities, Hostel, Labs, Library, Sports Complex, Wi-Fi Campus. Awadh Dental College and Hospital has also been rated 4.5 for Campuslife.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Government medical college, Bahraich UP.

review_content.Placements: It is a government college. Students are selected in it after clearing NEET, then after students choose this college in counseling for MBBS of 5n1/2 years. My college also provides other courses in medical professions like B.Sc. nursing and DMLT. After completing MBBS, you are allowed to practice in India.
review_content.Infrastructure: College is good, but it starts working in 2019, so it is a little bit new college, so some construction is continuing in college. But construction in medical colleges is quite normal, so it doesn't bother anyone. Hostels are good. College has a central library and Wi-Fi also. Canteen and mess are present, which works on a tender basis. Every year, a sports fest takes place in college. In college, badminton court and volleyball court are present.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Things to know before entering in government medical college Bahraich.

review_content.Placements: The course is for MBBS graduation. It's a batch of 100 people. The students are enrolled on the basis of the NEET UG scorecard. There are no such packages in the course. It is a journey of 5.5 years after which you can join for JR Ship, where your income could be around 12 lakh per annum.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and campus size are a bit small and the faculty members alone cannot be relied upon. You have to work on yourself and study the major portion by yourself. The hostel rooms are affordable and provide average facilities with a mess and a table tennis room.

Bahraich Medical College MBBS cutoff 2025 was 18254 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 18949 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Bahraich Medical College NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category was 127065. According to this range, the most competitive course is MD. For more details, see the table below.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Review of G H Raisoni University, Saikheda.

review_content.Placements: Minimum 60 percent are required to get admission in this course as this course is new. In this university, there are 3rd year seniors, and no one has graduated till now. Next year, 3rd year students are going to graduate, but I can tell the minimum package is 2 Lacs. Our college provides internships, and they will also tour you to an industrial visit where your placement will be held.
review_content.Infrastructure: Libraries are available, and all books are available in the library. Labs are good with digital computers and free Wi-Fi. Classrooms are good, providing good-quality food in canteens, and also medical facilities are available. Sports activities are also provided.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc in Biotechnology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: You will have an opportunity in the upcoming era.

review_content.Placements: The average placement packages were about 200000 per annum, and this college also provides placement in well-known companies like ICICI, and they also provide certificate courses with workshops and internship programs. They also held industrial visits in the industries where we can get placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: The faculty members are good but not best enough; they don't seem to be inexperienced; they need to get a little more experience, but this course provides one major subject and one minor subject. Zoology faculty members are good. As I chose Zoology as my minor subject, they held practicals and also taught very well.

review_summary.college_name: G H Raisoni University, Saikheda Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The College is Very Good and Infrastructure is Too Good.

content.Placements: In my college, companies come for recruiting the students for jobs. The lowest average package is 3-4 L and the highest package is 10-15 L. The jobs for CSE students who know about coding and DSA are available. The companies that come are TCS and Wipro, etc. The role for freshers involves doing small tasks in coding.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are very good, and classrooms, labs, and the library are clean. The food is also good, and the canteen food is too good in college. There are 3 canteens where you can enjoy your food. Medical facilities are 24x7. There are sports rooms and a clubhouse. In the clubhouse, there is a swimming pool, football, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Chemistry, Botany, Zoology) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: This college for education as well as festivals.

content.Placements: It can be 50% for passing. Companies in college like TCS, Wipro and etc., which is selected through aptitude exam or interview. Minimum 6 CGPA for internship. My course can be count in average level because they cannot giving importance in any festival.
content.Infrastructure: In college, the Wi-Fi facility is available in specific area. The labs could be clean and proper arranging requirements. Their chemical, instruments or apparatus be available. Classrooms can be cleaned and well possible. Library also available for your requirements.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of G H Raisoni University, Saikheda.

content.Placements: Minimum 60 percent are required to get admission in this course as this course is new. In this university, there are 3rd year seniors, and no one has graduated till now. Next year, 3rd year students are going to graduate, but I can tell the minimum package is 2 Lacs. Our college provides internships, and they will also tour you to an industrial visit where your placement will be held.
content.Infrastructure: Libraries are available, and all books are available in the library. Labs are good with digital computers and free Wi-Fi. Classrooms are good, providing good-quality food in canteens, and also medical facilities are available. Sports activities are also provided.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc in Biotechnology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: You will have an opportunity in the upcoming era.

content.Placements: The average placement packages were about 200000 per annum, and this college also provides placement in well-known companies like ICICI, and they also provide certificate courses with workshops and internship programs. They also held industrial visits in the industries where we can get placement.
content.Infrastructure: The faculty members are good but not best enough; they don't seem to be inexperienced; they need to get a little more experience, but this course provides one major subject and one minor subject. Zoology faculty members are good. As I chose Zoology as my minor subject, they held practicals and also taught very well.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college is good, you should consider it for your admission.

content.Placements: The highest package offered in this course is around 3 LPA and the lowest package is around 1.6 LPA. There aren’t any top recruiting companies but tech Mahindra visits for placements. 20% of the students get internships and job offers from B.Sc. CS course. The roles offered to the freshers includes that of junior software developer.
content.Infrastructure: Computer labs are good along with the classrooms being good. They provide indoor games and the canteen is good as well. The hostel has many facilities like good campus, services, infrastructure and medical facilities. A good Wi-Fi connection is also available in the campus.

reviews.review_heading: The College is Very Good and Infrastructure is Too Good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are very good, and classrooms, labs, and the library are clean. The food is also good, and the canteen food is too good in college. There are 3 canteens where you can enjoy your food. Medical facilities are 24x7. There are sports rooms and a clubhouse. In the clubhouse, there is a swimming pool, football, etc.

reviews.review_heading: This college for education as well as festivals.
reviews.review_text: In college, the Wi-Fi facility is available in specific area. The labs could be clean and proper arranging requirements. Their chemical, instruments or apparatus be available. Classrooms can be cleaned and well possible. Library also available for your requirements.

reviews.review_heading: Review of G H Raisoni University, Saikheda.
reviews.review_text: Libraries are available, and all books are available in the library. Labs are good with digital computers and free Wi-Fi. Classrooms are good, providing good-quality food in canteens, and also medical facilities are available. Sports activities are also provided.

reviews.review_heading: You will have an opportunity in the upcoming era.
reviews.review_text: The faculty members are good but not best enough; they don't seem to be inexperienced; they need to get a little more experience, but this course provides one major subject and one minor subject. Zoology faculty members are good. As I chose Zoology as my minor subject, they held practicals and also taught very well.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good, you should consider it for your admission.
reviews.review_text: Computer labs are good along with the classrooms being good. They provide indoor games and the canteen is good as well. The hostel has many facilities like good campus, services, infrastructure and medical facilities. A good Wi-Fi connection is also available in the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: This college offers numerous facilities for pharmacy students, including well-equipped labs with various instruments and chemicals. The knowledgeable teachers provide quality education, and there are dedicated lab instructors as well. Additionally, the college provides canteen and hostel facilities with satisfactory food options.

reviews.review_heading: Whole college is well structured.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure and it is much cleaner than the other college of jaypee. The campus size is small so good interaction between students irrespective of they are of same year or not the quality of hostels and food quality is good.

reviews.review_heading: It's joyful learning at GHRU.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is so good with all equipment, laboratories, and the agri learning practice areas like shade net house, poly house, poultry, farm pond, labs like issue culture, pathology, biochemistry, plant physiology, plant breeding, entomology, horticulture, dairy technology, sericulture, apiculture, agronomy, and organic farming. The library is open even in the evening and up to 12:00 AM, also for students who are committed to learning and enhancing their knowledge. Coming to the hostel, ...

reviews.review_heading: Expected a lot from this University,But realised it's not Worth
reviews.review_text:
The classrooms and college and hostel infrastructure is good, But the wifi and labs are not so useful, wifi doesn't work properly and always there is connectivity issues with that, And with labs they are good in appearance they are not used for the students teaching purpose they are just kept for the showcase of the college infrastructure.

In our hostel we have indoor games like carroms, pool, snooker and table tennis and there are gym facilities also provided in the hostel But there is no cant...

reviews.review_heading: I will never recommend this university to my relatives.
reviews.review_text: During my admission, counselors have said to me that the lectures will be in Nagpur, but you have to go for exams in Saikheda. Otherwise, all activities are in the Sadar Nagpur campus, and the Sadar campus is under construction. Due to this, there are lifts, and also many problems we have to face.

faqs.answer: A:    Calcutta Homoeopathic Medical College and Hospital courses are approved by eminent Government bodies such as CCH. The combined seats available for various programmes provided by Calcutta Homoeopathic Medical College and Hospital goes up to 50.
faqs.question: How many seats are available at Calcutta Homoeopathic Medical College and Hospital for all courses combined?

reviews_list.batch_info: BHMS - Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: My college is good for becoming a good homoeopathic physician.

review_content.Placements: My college is government college so per year admission cost average 7000, and there are many government jobs that one can opt for after passing BHMS. Those jobs are of hmo, mo, rbsk mo etc. Every student gets internship from our college in our government hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is good, every department of OPD is present in our college. Classroom are good and library is also very good. Canteen facility is poor. Hostel is very good. Girls hostel is available inside the college and boys hostel is present 15 min away from college.

reviews_list.batch_info: BHMS - Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good for becoming a good homoeopathic physician.

review_content.Placements: Ours is a 5-year course, including 4 years of academics and a year of internships. All students got internships. After completion of the course, many government and private jobs are available. We can start our own private clinic.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are good, and the library is also good. Labs are available. The canteen food is average. Sports facilities are not good. A hostel is available near the college campus.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are very humble and helpful. They teach very well. Every teacher is well qualified. They are dedicated to their students. They conduct yearly exams. The pass percentage is about 70%.

faqs.answer: To take admission in Sophia College for Women for B.Sc:Check the eligibility criteria for B.Sc admission at Sophia College for Women. The college prepares merit lists based on the marks or percentages of the applying students in the previous academic qualifications (10+2) .Check the merit lists released by the college. individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Choose chemistry in bachelor of science.

content.Placements: Most of the chemical manufacturing companies and pharmaceutical companies like Dow Chemical, DuPont, Otsuka Pharmaceutical, and Novartis were recruiting maximum number of graduates from our departments. For some of the exclusive roles, the highest package would be between INR 4.3 LPA to 14.4 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: This was one of the colleges meant for women in Mumbai, so students had full freedom in accessing the college sources for educational purposes only. Management supports interested women students to join the social club, organisations exclusively established for social activities.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (July 2025) - B.A. in Psychology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Campus life was great, but academics could be better.

content.Placements: Around 20%-30% of students were placed from our batch. The average package was modest, with few top placements, not named specifically but implied as limited few top placements. Some students got internships through college tie-ups with NGOs or research projects rules offered included HR assistant, counselor, intern, and research assistant.
content.Infrastructure: The institute offers good infrastructure with development in classrooms, a decent library, and Wi-Fi facilities. Hostel amenities are average, food is manageable but could improve. Basic medical aid and sports facilities are also available but limited.

faqs.question: How are B.Sc placements at Sophia College?
faqs.answer: The Sophia College for Women established in 1941 under the affiliation of University of Mumbai is run by the Governing Body of the Society for the Higher Education of Women in India. The college offers a variety of bachelor's and master's degree courses in many specialisation area of study. The Sophia College for Women is much recognizable for its Bachelor degree courses such as B.Sc (IT), B.Sc, BA, and BMM. Sophia College for Women in Mumbai is well known for its excellent academic offerings. It isn't clear that the college has a formal placement process in place for B.Sc. programmes. Placements are not directly offered by the campus. College has its own placement cell that invites the companies like Jio, Capgemini, and TCS etc. It’s also mentioned that internships are compulsory for gaining internal marks, which can be beneficial for students’ practical experience.

description: Sophia College cutoff 2024 for admission to various UG and PG courses is determined in the form of a merit list. Sophia College is one of the premier colleges affiliated with the University of Mumbai. Colleges affiliated with the University of Mumbai (MU) release multiple merit lists every year, followed by a counseling and document verification process to offer admission to students for UG and PG courses. Candidates whose names appear in the lists are required to attend the counselling session for the document verification process. These merit lists consist of the minimum cutoff score at which candidates are shortlisted for the counselling process of the university. reviews.review_heading: Inspiring professors, vibrant campus life, ample resources ideal for growth and learning.
reviews.review_text: The hostel at our college is great. My friend from Kashmir came to study IT. The rooms and food availability are good, the washrooms are clean, and great hygiene is maintained. Because our course was computer-based, we used to sit in labs that had good laptop services and a huge lab where everyone had their own computer in front of them. The software was easy to load, and the lab was cleaned. The food that the hostel provides is different from the canteen we have and is good and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: B.A. in Psychology from the Sophia College.
reviews.review_text: Sophia College has really good infrastructure. The college had a big campus with facilities such as a sports field, Wi-Fi, parking, labs, a library, canteen and all other necessary facilities for the students. A hostel facility was also available for the students. The food in the canteen and hostel mess was good to eat. Many sports tournaments are organized at our college for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Good teachers and curriculum, could work more on the facilities for students.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure and the classes represent a classic pink British style. There is a central lawn and auditorium as well. The well decorated arches and intricately designed pillars add to the charm. There is a canteen with coffee and juice shops as well. There is a sports club also with a basketball court on campus. Wi-Fi is there in the library and in the hostel as well. But the hostel infrastructure is quite old and there are little to no developments. Students do not have much privac...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sophia College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is great. Hostel facilities are good, but it has limited seats. Our campus has the famous Bhabha Auditorium. There is a digital studio. There is a decent library in this college. Canteen is available. A stationery shop is also available. There is a central lawn on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sophia College.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is enabled in every classroom. It provides a library and several books are available like fiction, non-fiction, journals related to national and international, biography, encyclopedias, dictionary, art books, maps, audio-visual materials such as CD-ROMs, DVDs, slides, and filmstrips are also available. The library uses SLIM 21 software for all information management. The library is central and common to all academic activities. In the girls' hostel, there are 105 beds. Sports facilities li...

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for graduation in Mumbai.
reviews.review_text: The college is well-equipped with the latest technologies, There is a huge library which has books for all fields and the faculty is also cooperative. Classrooms are neat and wide. There are blackboards and some classrooms are equipped with digital boards. The hostel admission is provided based on your marks overall the year. There are is limited seats for the hostel, so it is based on a first come first basis.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are good here. It provides good placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Labs infrastructure is average. Classrooms are good with good ventilation in our college. It has a huge library with good books. The quality of food served is good. Many types of sports and games are available. A gym is also available here.

reviews.review_heading: It is a college that builds you as a person. You can gain experiences beyond academics and grow.
reviews.review_text: Sophia is quite famous for its canteen as told by people who got to attend offline classes before the pandemic. The building is beautiful. I am not sure but I had heard that it used to be a palace before. However, the hostel has a very limited number of seats.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, amazing college with amazing opportunities if you are willing to take them up.
reviews.review_text: Former palace turned college has a very beautiful architectural style. It's almost unbelievable that such a beautiful college is right in the middle of a concrete jungle. Every possible service is provided in the campus itself, ranging from canteen to counselling center.

reviews.review_heading: The college life at Sophia College is the best.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is beautiful, with excellent infrastructure and canteen. It is probably the best canteen in Mumbai. You will never feel bored at any time as always different and interesting events are organised every day. There is a vast library with a huge and varied collection of books. Many rare books which are not found in many places are available in our library which you need to look into during your assignments and projects. Many sports are available. There are many places to hang out with fri...

reviews_list.review_title: Medical College with good fecilities

review_content.Placements: 56% students gets placement. The average salary of a normal MBBS doctor is approximately 50000. West Bengal government is the main recruiting company. 100% students gets chance to complete in the college hospital to internship. Housestaff is the top roles The other nursing home and diagnostic centres are also hire students from this college
review_content.Infrastructure: All the faculties are well educated and labs are well decorated. Library is fully air conditioning and wifi is available. Hostel is superb and rooms are quite big. Bus is provided by the authorities for transport from hostel to college. In every hostel room 2 persons can stay. Almirah, bed, table, chair, mattress are provided by the authorities.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Path to success with Way of life : RPHGMCH

review_content.Placements: Almost every student gets placement in any of the Govt. hospitals, but they really don't need it as becoming a doctor, everyone can run their own chamber . 100 % of students have to do an internship in the hospital under college, and it's mandatory for everyone, and it is government-approved . Students get jobs of junior doctors like house staff and senior residents.
review_content.Infrastructure: Central AC Library, labs with modern objects, central AC Lecture theatre with digital class facility, etc., are provided to all the students. Hostel is well maintained, newly formed, and hygienic with playground facilities. Gym room , reading area, etc., are present. Hostel canteen is good, and the quality of food is well eatable. Besides the hostel, there's a Block primary Health centre, so every facility of medical first aid is present there . Cricket,Football , Volleyball, Badminton, table tennis, Carrom, etc., are played.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: RPGMCH: The way of our new beginning.

review_content.Placements: There is nothing called placement after MBBS, but as a doctor, everyone can run their own chamber or apply for a house staffship, which goes through an interview process and recruitment is done according. Average salary is 12 LPA. 100 out of 100 students will get an internship in our own hospital under a government scheme.
review_content.Infrastructure: Lecture Theatre, Practical Labs, Dissection Hall, Library, Hospital Visit—everything is available that is needed. Canteen food is average—not good as home but eatable. Our hostel is well maintained and hygienic and also has a small playing area. Medical facilities are also available in the hostel, as beside it BPHC is located.

content.Placements: 100 students capacity in our college in every batch. Our college is 5 years old. fees_and_eligibility.overview: Directorate of Correspondence Courses and Distance Education, Bangalore University offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Part Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies and Accounting & Commerce. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.Com, B.A. and BBA. Whereas, at PG level, Directorate of Correspondence Courses and Distance Education, Bangalore University offers courses such as M.Sc., M.Com and PG Diploma. Directorate of Correspondence Courses and Distance Education, Bangalore University fee structure for all the courses is around INR 5,870 to 33,040.

review_content.General: Bangalore University has a big geographical area, which means more than 1100 acres. I got a free seat here, because of the category. Most of the students are from middle-class family, backward class family and poor background. Most of students do come here only because of free seats they get.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college should develop a lot. There is no seminar hall in the department. No drinking water facility and cleaned washrooms. Our economic department has only 3 or 4 rooms. They are managing in those rooms only. Here are more than 150 students are here who are studying PG and PhD. Still no better facilities. No projector is used, maybe they didn't even have it. They have no computers. Still, this department is far behind in developed education system.

Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing ExecutiveBusiness Technical ConsultantAll the best.

faqs.answer: Humanities as a stream provides a wide range of courses that can be studied after completing their 12th grade. Pursuing any of these degrees prepares you to understand the various levels of humanities and, as a result, carve out an appropriate job path. Candidates in the humanities can apply for positions in the government sector, such as banking firms, government ministries, legal firms, and political analysts.Content Writer, Civil Services, Human Resource Manager, Defense Services, Lawyer, Journalist, Counsellor, and Therapist positions are available. As freshers, humanities graduates can expect to earn between INR 2-6 LPA.
faqs.question: Q: What is the Scope of Humanities and Social Science courses?

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in Political Science - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with the teaching quality, placements, and hostel life.

content.Placements: The University is a government institution so there are no placements. Once you pass out from the campus, you can find a job on your own. You can always try for government jobs and there is free coaching available in the campus regarding it. These classes are held in the evening.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is huge and environment friendly. The central library is full with all the required books related to the course. When it comes to hostel the rooms are very small and food is not that good.
content.Faculty: The teaching quality is quite average and most professors teach in the regional language. Most of the time, temporary Ph.D. scholars take classes on their behalf.

reviews.review_heading: Good coaching and leadership
University's teaching is good
Reviewing about my college
The Natural Forest In Between The Concrete Forest In Bangalore
reviews.review_text: The environment is the main thing in the campus which serves a major role in attracting people. The wifi is also provided and computers also provided. The library is also present in the department and in University. The hostel is cheap and best. The hostel cost is 2500 per month. The food is good as per the money. There is also a health centre and we are encouraged for sports and games. The sports and games are conducted twice per year.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend joining this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The library has very good facilities. All departments are well-managed. Hostels are not good. Our college provides good facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Bangalore University evaluation.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not good as it does not have basic facilities. Washroom facilities are not good. Even in hostel, food and accommodation are not good. The college should work on improvements and implementations.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the campus environment. But want to update the curriculum to outbring talents.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi available on our campus which we can get by submitting an application for access to the Wi-Fi to Bangalore University. There are PGs available for accommodating students and it has a canteen in it where goods are provided. For medical facilities at have a medical centre on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: It's a beautiful college to study with good teaching. It's also good regarding placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our college and infrastructure in our department are very good. Any student can easily work in our department with many facilities like Wi-Fi, systems, a lot of books in the library and many more. The hostel is also nice enough with somewhat average food or nice.

reviews.review_heading: It has good teaching faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, a library, ventilated classrooms, transport, labs, a sports arena, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Poor education and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Actually that college which we joined were a government college, so the infrastructure was very poor. Washrooms were not there, and maintenance were not done properly. We did not had good library facilities, only old books were there which were not helpful for us.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: This college provides you the facilities like Wi-Fi, transportation, academic curricular activities. All classrooms are well-equipped with projectors. A quality in food and hygiene canteen is well maintained. Separate hostel for boys and girls is provided at a reasonable fare.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: A short glimpse of GMC Firozabad .

review_content.Placements: It is an medical college providing internship to almost 100 percent of students in allied hospital ie. District hospital. In internship, average student get around 12 k - 18k for a month. Intern will be posted in each department for around 1- 1.5 months i.e. rotatory internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are seperate lecture theatre for each batch for theory classes. Proper building is there, a well maintained academic block with each department having sufficient facilities like Wi-Fi, library, etc. Seperate hostels for boys and girls with attached mess. Sports facility also present.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Government Medical College Firozabad.

review_content.Placements: Internships for 2019 batch are provided in 2024 which will be the first batch of our college for NEET PG.
review_content.Infrastructure: Academic block and the library are well-equipped and has well-established infrastructure. Library has air-conditioners. Canteen and cafeteria facilities are not available but separate girls' and boys' messes are provided with scheduled weekly menu charts. Sports are played by students.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members in our college are knowledgeable and qualified. They organise various seminars every year, project chartworks, group discussions, and educational skits performed by students which are given marks in the internal assessments. Semester exams are little difficult compared to professional exams.

review_summary.college_name: Government Medical College Firozabad Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The dream of becoming a doctor fulfilled.

content.Placements: This is a new college. None of the batches have completed their internships yet, so let's see what the upcoming ratio of selected students in NEET PG will be in the upcoming years. Batch 2019 will be the first batch to give the NEET PG score.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good; as it is a new college, everything in the college is new: furniture, equipment, labs. It's a Wi-Fi campus, even in the hostel Wi-Fi is installed. There is a canteen, and a mess is also available. There are good facilities for sports, and a library is there too.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Average but a worthy medical college.

content.Placements: Since it is a medical college providing internships to almost all 100 students, interns will be posting in different areas for 1 to 1.5 months. All of these postings are in an allied hospital, i.e., a district hospital. In an internship, students get around 12k–18k for a month.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is amazing. The library has all the famous and useful books for MBBS. We have limited space for outdoor and indoor games and other activities. We celebrate some events, like the college festival, Dandiya nights and some religious events. Classrooms are well ventilated and sufficient.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A short glimpse of GMC Firozabad .

content.Placements: It is an medical college providing internship to almost 100 percent of students in allied hospital ie. District hospital. In internship, average student get around 12 k - 18k for a month. Intern will be posted in each department for around 1- 1.5 months i.e. rotatory internship.
content.Infrastructure: There are seperate lecture theatre for each batch for theory classes. Proper building is there, a well maintained academic block with each department having sufficient facilities like Wi-Fi, library, etc. Seperate hostels for boys and girls with attached mess. Sports facility also present.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Government Medical College Firozabad.

content.Placements: Internships for 2019 batch are provided in 2024 which will be the first batch of our college for NEET PG.
content.Infrastructure: Academic block and the library are well-equipped and has well-established infrastructure. Library has air-conditioners. Canteen and cafeteria facilities are not available but separate girls' and boys' messes are provided with scheduled weekly menu charts. Sports are played by students.
content.Faculty: Faculty members in our college are knowledgeable and qualified. They organise various seminars every year, project chartworks, group discussions, and educational skits performed by students which are given marks in the internal assessments. Semester exams are little difficult compared to professional exams.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure is good, the faculty is helpful, and all library facilities are okay.

content.Placements: As we are in MBBS, there is nothing to say about the placements. We are a batch of about 100 students, and we are the second batch from our college. Our college can't tell about the final year results. According to the present results, we are hoping for a good result in the future with a good amount of PG selection.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. The college campus is okay. The college campus is outside the city, so the area around it is not well developed. Library facilities are also not bad. Sports facilities are not up to the mark but are okay. Mess food is as in other colleges.

description: Government Medical College Firozabad cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Government Medical College Firozabad NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 26148 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Government Medical College Firozabad MBBS cutoff 2025 was 26148 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 17273 for admission to the MBBS course. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Government Medical College Firozabad accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Government Medical College Firozabad NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category was 68800. According to this range, the most competitive course is MD. For more details, see the table below.

According to the Government Medical College Firozabad MD cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisation for the General AI category was MD in Pathology. The round 4 closing rank for this specialisation was 68800.
Students can refer to the table below to know NEET PG cutoffs across different categories, courses, and years.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

Government Medical College Firozabad cutoff 2025 is out for Round 1, wherein the closing rank for MBBS admission is 17842 among the General HS category students. The cutoff has been released as opening and closing ranks for different categories of students belonging to the HS quota.

Among the OBC category candidates, the UP NEET UG Round 1 cutoff stood at 20020 for MBBS under the HS quota. To view the cutoff ranks for different categories, rounds and quotas, use the provided filtres.

reviews.review_heading: The dream of becoming a doctor fulfilled.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good; as it is a new college, everything in the college is new: furniture, equipment, labs. It's a Wi-Fi campus, even in the hostel Wi-Fi is installed. There is a canteen, and a mess is also available. There are good facilities for sports, and a library is there too.

reviews.review_heading: Average but a worthy medical college.
reviews.review_text: The campus is amazing. The library has all the famous and useful books for MBBS. We have limited space for outdoor and indoor games and other activities. We celebrate some events, like the college festival, Dandiya nights and some religious events. Classrooms are well ventilated and sufficient.

reviews.review_heading: A short glimpse of GMC Firozabad .
reviews.review_text: There are seperate lecture theatre for each batch for theory classes. Proper building is there, a well maintained academic block with each department having sufficient facilities like Wi-Fi, library, etc. Seperate hostels for boys and girls with attached mess. Sports facility also present.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government Medical College Firozabad.
reviews.review_text: Academic block and the library are well-equipped and has well-established infrastructure. Library has air-conditioners. Canteen and cafeteria facilities are not available but separate girls' and boys' messes are provided with scheduled weekly menu charts. Sports are played by students.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is good, the faculty is helpful, and all library facilities are okay.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The college campus is okay. The college campus is outside the city, so the area around it is not well developed. Library facilities are also not bad. Sports facilities are not up to the mark but are okay. Mess food is as in other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college and had a good experience, not dissatisfied with it.
reviews.review_text: Academic block has an excellent infrastructure with teachers from some of the best institutions like AIIMS Delhi. The hostels are our pride as they are very good, neat and clean. Good quality mess food is also available. Our hostel rooms and library has Wi-Fi for every one.

reviews.review_heading: Review of this college for the new batches joining this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is quite not so good. It lacks in some sports facilities. Rest the facilities provided by all the departments in the college are good. Labs are well maintained. A library is also provided by the college for self study.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college and hostels are good. Free Wi-Fi services are available in both the hostel and the college. The campus remains clean. There are very good practical laboratories with equipment, which is necessary for developing skills and knowledge. The food quality is also satisfactory.

reviews.review_heading: GMC Firozabad is best among all newly opened medical colleges in UP.
reviews.review_text: The college campus has well managed library but it has no Wi-Fi connection. The labs are well maintained and lecture theater are also good. Hostels are separate for boys and girls and have all basic needs like proper water along with lift and Wi-Fi. Mess are also their in each hostel but the quality of food is not so good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good medical institute with experienced faculty members, good labs, library and hostel.
reviews.review_text: This college is a newly established medical college so the infrastructure is not so good, because infrastructure needs a lot of time to become better. Wi-Fi facility is provided in hostel and academic block. Laboratories, library, classroom are fully air-conditioned and well-developed. Canteen service does not provide yet. For sports, a stadium is attached to the college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good faculty members and curriculum.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the hostel is average, and it provides basic facilities. But it could have been better. There is no ground for us to play and if it rains then we have nothing to do. There is no proper cutting of grass. Initially, there was a contract with a stadium but now the college does not pay for it.

reviews.review_heading: Autonomous state medical college Firozabad.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure in the college is excellent as it is new opened medical college, college campus has well-equipped labs, lecture theatres and proper air conditioned library. Boys and girls hostel are seperate with attached mess, hostel rooms are two seater. Hostel and campus has lift also.

reviews.review_heading: It is an autonomous state medical college and hospital in Firozabad.
reviews.review_text: Labs of all departments are well-maintained and equipped with good ventilation and an environment to practice and learn. The campus is not Wi-Fi oriented. Lecture theatres are good and enough for 100 students and also air-conditioned. There is an air-conditioned and large library which can accommodate more than 200 students. The timing of issuing books is fixed.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government Medical College Firozabad.
reviews.review_text: It is a new campus and was started in 2019 only. The buildings are new and advanced. Highly furnished lecture theatres are available with digital advancement. The library is good, and the labs are developed for all research purposes. The hostel mess provides good and hygienic food at a reasonable rate. All medical facilities are provided free of cost to all students.

reviews.review_heading: It has great infrastructure and worthy experience of medical student life with working out tips.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is great. The central library is very big and great. Free Wi-Fi is available across the campus and hostel. Labs are equipped with all the required facilities, and classrooms are spacious with seats arranged in the form of stairs with air-conditioning. Mess is attached to the hostel and has great food.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of GITAM School of Science, Visakhapatnam.

review_content.Placements: The best placements are offered here. Somehow, few students join my course. Because it is a food system course. The highest package is 20 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA. Many companies offer job opportunities.
review_content.Infrastructure: GITAM University has the best infrastructure. We have a well-equipped and well-stocked library with central AC and Wi-Fi. We have AC classrooms. We have labs for all subjects. Our hostel is very nice and washrooms are very clean. We also have medical facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Data Science - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, the best College for M.Sc. In the Data Science Course.

review_content.Placements: The minimum will be 3 LPA, and the maximum for the M.Sc. The Data Science course will be 27 LPA. The median package is around 16 LPA. Top recruiters were here, including Mu Sigma, Genpact, Databricks, etc. About 66% got selected for internships. Both foreign and domestic internships were available to the students. The top jobs are Data Engineer, Business Intelligence Analyst, and so on.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything here was fantastic. The labs were well furnished. The arrangement of the classrooms was outstanding, and the departmental library was satisfactory. Wi-Fi services were accessible all across the campus. Hotel rooms may not be better, but the chaos was the same. Hospital and sports avenues are outstanding.

The institute is also rated by National Assessment and Accreditation Council (NAAC) with an A grade.

review_summary.college_name: GITAM School of Science, Visakhapatnam Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Food Science and Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the best College for M.Sc. In the Food Science and Technology Course.

content.Placements: 79% of students are placed in our college. The maximum income offered at our college was 9 LPA, while the lowest compensation was 3 LPA. The internship rate at our college is 70%. Food Technologies, Nutritional Therapist, and other top professions are available through our training. Amul, Britannia, PepsiCo, and other companies are among the leading recruiters.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has no hostels. In terms of amenities, it competes with other colleges in the city. Our college is equipped with a library, reading room, theatre, auditorium, computer lab, IT-enabled classroom, cafeteria, and gymnasium. Cleanliness is very important at our college. Bathrooms are clean, with water purifiers on each floor.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Data Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college has very beautiful infrastructure, and the connectivity with people is very good.

content.Placements: Around 50% of students get placed. The package ranges from 3 to 11 LPA. Companies include Accenture, Wipro, and Infosys. About 20% of students get internships. The most common role offered is Software Engineer. If we prepare from the beginning, we can secure an internship or a job.
content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are the best compared to other colleges. Food and medical facilities are very good. For sports and games, the college provides a balance of education and pursuing passions.
content.Faculty: Most teachers are very helpful. Around 90% are qualified. The teaching quality is good. The curriculum is relevant, making students industry-ready. Semester exams are simple if we study for at least one hour per day. The pass percentage is 90%.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Food Science and Technology - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of GITAM School of Science, Visakhapatnam.

content.Placements: The best placements are offered here. Somehow, few students join my course. Because it is a food system course. The highest package is 20 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA. Many companies offer job opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: GITAM University has the best infrastructure. We have a well-equipped and well-stocked library with central AC and Wi-Fi. We have AC classrooms. We have labs for all subjects. Our hostel is very nice and washrooms are very clean. We also have medical facilities.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Data Science - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the best College for M.Sc. In the Data Science Course.

content.Placements: The minimum will be 3 LPA, and the maximum for the M.Sc. The Data Science course will be 27 LPA. The median package is around 16 LPA. Top recruiters were here, including Mu Sigma, Genpact, Databricks, etc. About 66% got selected for internships. Both foreign and domestic internships were available to the students. The top jobs are Data Engineer, Business Intelligence Analyst, and so on.
content.Infrastructure: Everything here was fantastic. The labs were well furnished. The arrangement of the classrooms was outstanding, and the departmental library was satisfactory. Wi-Fi services were accessible all across the campus. Hotel rooms may not be better, but the chaos was the same. Hospital and sports avenues are outstanding.

Some recruiting companies are Nestle and Pepsico. Around 80% of students secured internships in many food and dairy industries. Roles offered are quality assurance and quality checking.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are good. There is no Wi-Fi facility around the campus. Labs are good. The library is better with all the needed books. Hostel food is good. All sports and games are conducted every week. Sports and tournaments are held on campus every month.

admission_overview.college_name: GITAM School of Science, Visakhapatnam Admissions 2025: Dates, Application Process, Eligibility, Courses & Fee

admission_process.title: GITAM School of Science Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: GITAM School of Science, Visakhapatnam admission is entrance-based.Students can pursue various courses at the institute in Computer Application and Science. The courses are offered at UG, PG, and Diploma levels.GITAM School of Scienceis part of theGITAM UniversityVishakhapatnam. Students seeking admission to the offered programme can read the following article to learn more about the institute's admission process.

GITAM School of Science admission 2025is ongoing and the aspirants can apply by visiting the official website. The college offers students full-time UG and PG courses across two major fields and multiple specialisations. Additionally, the doctoral programme is provided in both full-time and part-time modes. Students can visit the official website of the university to apply for the desired course. Find below some more highlights on theGITAM School of Science admissionand courses:
Particulars
GITAM School of Science Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
How to apply?
Online: https://www.gitam.edu/admissions
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes
Download Brochure

GITAM School of Science course admissionis primarily entrance-based. Seats at the institute are provided based on the selection rounds and basic eligibility. Additionally, students also need to clear the GITAM Admission Test (GAT). Aspirants can look at the table below to learn about the admission criteria forGITAM School of Science courses:
Step 2:Shortlisting and Screening Process

The admissions committee will screen and shortlist the applicants based on the admission requirements. GITAM SOS accepts GAT exam score conducted by GITAM University for shortlisting. Those shortlisted after the initial screening process are then invited for a GDPI round.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation

Selected candidates will receive communication from the GITAM School of Science through email or other means. To confirm their admission, candidates are required to pay the first instalment of the course fee within the stipulated time frame.

courses_data.name: GITAM School of Science BSc Admission 2025
eligibility: Accepting Exams:GITAM GAT, AP EAMCET, CUET, NEET
courses_data.description: GITAM School of Science provides full-time undergraduate course in the BSc program. The duration of the course is three years. The candidates seeking to take admission in the course need to meet the minimum eligibility i.e., to pass Class 12 or equivalent in the Science stream from a recognized board. GITAM School of Science BSc admission is based on entrance. The applicants must appear and pass the GITAM Admission Test (GAT) for securing a seat in the institute. The programme is offered in different specializations, including Biotechnology, Microbiology, Environmental Science, and others.

faqs.question: What BSc specialisations are offered at GITAM School of Science Visakhapatnam?
faqs.answer: GITAM School of Science offers a BSc programme under 11 specialisations including Biochemistry, Biotechnology, Chemistry, Electronics, Environmental Science, Food Science & Technology, Mathematics, Microbiology, Physics, Statistics and Computer Science with Cognitive Systems in association with TCS. To be eligible for these courses the candidates need a minimum of 50% in class 12.

faqs.question: How to get into BSc courses at GITAM Bangalore?
faqs.answer: GITAM University Bangalore BSc admissions are made based on GAT scores. Students interested in taking admission at GITAM must first apply and appear for the GITAM Admission Test (GAT). After the GAT results are announced, the college prepares a rank list based on the scores. Based on the rank list, students are shortlisted for the counseling process.After that, GITAM BSc seats are allocated based on GAT scores and university’s BSc seat intake. Students who get allocated a seat must then report t

courses_data.name: GITAM School of Science MSc Admission 2025
courses_data.description: GITAM School of Science has a full-time MSc programme for a duration of 2 yrs at the PG (postgraduate) level. GITAM conducts its own entrance test to give  admission to the course. Students can choose from a variety of specialisations including Biotechnology,Food Science & Technology, Organic Chemistry,Data Science, Electronics, &Physics, among others. Students can apply online through the official site to apply or learn more about the desired course.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for admission to the MSc programme at GITAM School of Science?
faqs.answer: To be eligible for the MSc programme at GITAM School of Science MSc programme candidates should have completed a BSc/BPharm/BCA with a minimum of 50% aggregate from a recognized university.  In some cases, Class 12/Intermediate or equivalent qualifications with specific subject requirements are also necessary. Selection for admission is based on the GITAM Admission Test (GAT) PG (Science), followed by a Group Discussion and Personal Interview (GDPI) process.

faqs.question: What is the fee for MSc at GITAM School of Science?
faqs.answer: GITAM School of Science offers UG, PG, PhD, and research programmes under 8 departments.MScis one of the flagship programmes at GITAM School of Science Visakhapatnam. The fees for various courses depends on various components such as application fee, mess charges, examination fee, hostel fees, etc. For the MSc program, the fees ranges betweenINR 2.2 Lacs - INR 3.9 Lacs.

faqs.question: How can I get BSc seat at GITAM Bangalore?
faqs.answer: GITAM Bangalore BSc seats are allocated based on applicants’ scores in the GITAM Aptitude Exam. Thus, it is mandatory for students to take the GAT exam. Moreover, as per the official website of the university, seats are allocated on a first come first basis. Interested students can also check the below eligibility crietria before applying:Eligibility Criteria:Any candidate with a minimum of 50% or 5.0 CGPA (55% in the case of CBSE, ICSE, ISCSE, IGSCE, and IB) in Class 12 is eligible to apply. However, to be eligible for BSc Computer Science with Cognitive Systems, a candidate must have scored 60% or 6.0 CGPA in Class 12.

faqs.question: What is the fee structure of GITAM School of Science, Visakhapatnam B.Sc. Course?
faqs.answer: The fee structure of GITAM School of Science, Visakhapatnam B.Sc. Course ranges between INR 1.8 Lacs - INR 3 Lacs. The duration of the course is from three to five years. The entrance exam accepted for GITAM B.Sc. Admissions is GAT (UGTP) which is followed by group discussion and Personal Interview . For more details, visit- https://www.shiksha.com/college/gitam-school-of-science-visakhapatnam-55709/courses .

reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good. There is no Wi-Fi facility around the campus. Labs are good. The library is better with all the needed books. Hostel food is good. All sports and games are conducted every week. Sports and tournaments are held on campus every month.

reviews.review_heading: The college offers excellent facilities including top-notch hostels and canteens.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure in our department are very modest. It does have Wi-Fi, lifts, excellent labs, spacious classrooms with projectors to learn classes by faculty, and even we have the best library. The quality of the facilities in the hostel, the quality of the food in the mess, and the canteen sports and games is the best I have ever seen. This is the most unique and the best experience I have ever had.

reviews.review_heading: The college was good and environment was good and career best college.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are equipped with smart boards and visual aids and air conditions, spacious and conducive to learning, and high-speed Wi-Fi enabling access to online resources and dedicated labs, and well-stocked library and an innovative research center.

reviews.review_heading: I joined the college and I personally love how it's going here. Everything is perfect.
reviews.review_text: The class labs and everything are perfect here. The library is so vast and big here. There are separate rooms for students to read, group discussion, and self-study, and so many books for every field. It's best to study here without any other thinking. Cultural activities always happen here. There are several clubs or groups here for dance, song, etc. The medical college is also inside here, so there is no worry if you are sick. Wi-Fi connections are all over the college.

reviews.review_heading: Gitam university review .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college and the hostels is very good. They provide the Wi-Fi in the classroom and also in the hostels. There is one central library in the library, and there are a minimum of 7,000 books available. In the cooler there are too many canteens. All the canteens are pocket-friendly.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty and staff are great.
reviews.review_text: The campus is very well-maintained with a good library, canteen, labs, and class facilities. It is located in the heart of the IT hub and city center, with very convenient transport facilities. Wi-Fi is also available. The canteen serves fresh food with proper hygiene, and there is a water cooler.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Gitam deemed University Bachelor of computer applications.
reviews.review_text: The college provides Wi-Fi all over the campus, and there is a separate building for each department. There is also a library. And hostel facilities are also provided. Classrooms contain the projectors, and also Wi-Fi is provided. Some department classrooms are also air conditioned.

reviews.review_heading: Review of GITAM B.Sc. Biotechnology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Gitam is good and boring at the at the same time they are renewing all though but still, there are some gaps. You might love the campus greenery and also the pace when nobody is around. ICT is always crowded but despite that, all the buildings have pleasant entry and classrooms are traditional for science students, whereas for engineering it's well-equipped. The structure of courses is also maintained in a good way but there are slight issues in grading, which leads to conf...

reviews.review_heading: GITAM is an excellent college for freedom and enjoyment as well as study.
reviews.review_text: GITAM provides maximum facilities like Wi-Fi, the best classrooms, labs and libraries. In the library, digital computers are available and huge resources are available even for competitive exams in higher education. The food was super but the fee hikes are very high and disappoint. So I look into PGs with a good budget and food available with Wi-Fi facilities; they are within walking distance of the college. Around 900 meters of good hostels are there. Medical facilities are there; GIMSR Hospita...

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the placements.
reviews.review_text: The college campus area is huge, to say extreme. It's about 100 acres and has many blocks with all kinds of sports, huge grounds for cricket and tennis and an indoor stadium for games like basketball and table tennis. There are a few temples inside the campus, too. The hostels, I may say, are pretty great, as they are well maintained with quite strict security. And talking about the girls hostel, it's very secure. The rooms, which are shared between 3 and 4, are averagely priced at around 80–90k...

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. The facilities they provide include a well equipped lab, classrooms with projectors, and Wi-Fi. The faculty have high qualifications. The college premises are vast with gardens and nature. The hostel is good, and the food is prepared by well trained chefs.
